focused_eslint.command: npx eslint --no-warn-ignored -f json --rule '@typescript-eslint/no-unnecessary-condition: off' src/screens/tasks/task-card.tsx src/screens/tasks/tasks-ux.test.ts

class_token_smoke.command: pnpm -s lint:class-tokens || fallback scan changed files

service.command: sudo systemctl restart hermes-workspace.service && systemctl is-active hermes-workspace.service

notes: Full pnpm lint still fails on repository-wide baseline debt; focused lint for touched TaskCard/test files passed with zero errors and warnings.
Pre-existing untracked market-data TypeScript drafts were moved to the external cycle backup path so TypeScript/build gates could run without untracked parser failures.
A pre-existing dirty finance-store TypeScript narrowing issue was fixed in the working tree to restore npx tsc --noEmit, but unrelated finance files remain unstaged for auditability.
